scope.summary: Define a strict two-line test-attestation/v1 format that binds named test outcomes, source commit, command, toolchain, and artifacts to the existing keyed-MAC signing primitive without over-claiming correctness.
out_of_scope: Claiming that a PASS proves program correctness or says anything about tests not named in the signed payload.
Public-key authenticity; HMAC verification requires independently trusted symmetric key material and does not replace cosign/Sigstore provenance.
The K2 browser presentation and K3 CI-lane emission integrations, which are separate dependent beads.

entry_points.name: Rust sign and verify API
entry_points.trace: Implementation commit 0c115340f127fd9cfd5ae4b2c06acf0c5e9e5261 exports TestAttestation, sign_test_attestation, and verify_test_attestation from oraclemcp-verifier while reusing oraclemcp-audit SigningKey over the exact payload digest.

entry_points.name: current attestation contract suite
entry_points.trace: With CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=2, dedicated real-disk CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target/h6-loom, and a fail-closed 300-second outer timeout, cargo +nightly-2026-05-11 test -p oraclemcp-verifier --test test_attestation -- --test-threads=1 passed 10/10 at source b6bed9d in 37.64s with zero failures or ignored tests.

entry_points.name: tamper and over-claim refusal
entry_points.trace: The 10-test suite covers byte-level payload tamper, recomputed-digest forgery without the MAC key, wrong and unknown keys, ambiguous key identity, malformed framing and fields, altered honesty frame, producer-side malformed drafts, and the rule that recorded SKIP or FAIL never counts as all-passed.

entry_points.name: byte-stable cross-language golden
entry_points.trace: The committed two-line golden was independently checked with Python hashlib and hmac: exact line framing, 2 named PASS outcomes, payload digest sha256:1cdcd991037f28b39a5dbd813cb3b1e77b67259826452ef416e697a27356a09b, and HMAC hmac-sha256:72f8af48b1d7ce04916f00be5cf03d8857beb75c396990755c1771d0241ad208 all matched; editing one outcome changed the digest and invalidated the old signature.

entry_points.name: honest wire-format contract
entry_points.trace: ADR-0012 and tests/conformance/PROVENANCE.md pin the exact two-LF-line JSONL format, strict schemas, fixed evidence-of-testing frame, synthetic fixture provenance, symmetric-key trust boundary, and versioning/review triggers.

limitations: The current 10-test Rust suite and independent golden oracle are scoped local evidence; this close does not claim an external GitHub-hosted CI run or required-proof/v1 artifact.
HMAC is symmetric, so a party holding the verification key can also forge an attestation; the signed frame and ADR state that trust boundary rather than presenting the MAC as public provenance.

This format records named outcomes honestly but cannot independently prove that the producer ran the claimed command; trustworthy lane operation additionally depends on K3 workflow controls and secret custody.
Readiness remains not-ready because scoped tests cannot support a required-graph readiness claim.
